Adds a new task to the system.

Adds a new task.

Adds a task to the system.

Adds a new task to the system.

B

build() - Method in interface taskmanager.api.TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
Builds and returns the final TaskManager instance.
build() - Method in class taskmanager.impl.DefaultTaskManagerBuilder
Builds and returns a fully configured TaskManager instance.

Fetches weather information for a given location asynchronously.

Fetches weather data for a given location.

Fetches weather data for a given location.

Retrieves all tasks as a stream.

Retrieves all tasks.

Retrieves all tasks as a list.

Retrieves all tasks as a list.

Returns the value of the recommendation record component.
removeTask(String) - Method in interface taskmanager.api.TaskManager
Removes a task from the system using its unique ID.
removeTask(String) - Method in interface taskmanager.api.TaskService
Removes a task by its ID.

Removes a task by its ID.
removeTask(String) - Method in class taskmanager.impl.DefaultTaskService
Removes a task by its ID.

S

SchedulePlanner - Interface in taskmanager.api
Defines scheduling logic for recommending task execution order.
SchedulePlannerImpl - Class in taskmanager.impl
Implementation of the SchedulePlanner interface.
SchedulePlannerImpl(WeatherApiClient) - Constructor for class taskmanager.impl.SchedulePlannerImpl
Constructs a SchedulePlanner with a weather API client.
ScheduleRecommendation - Record Class in taskmanager.model
Represents a scheduling recommendation for a specific task.
ScheduleRecommendation(Task, String) - Constructor for record class taskmanager.model.ScheduleRecommendation
Creates an instance of a ScheduleRecommendation record class.
setDescription(String) - Method in class taskmanager.model.Task
Sets the task description.
setDueDateTime(LocalDateTime) - Method in class taskmanager.model.Task
Updates the task deadline.
setTitle(String) - Method in class taskmanager.model.Task
Sets the task title.
setWeatherSensitive(boolean) - Method in class taskmanager.model.Task
Sets whether the task depends on weather conditions.
SmartTaskManagerFrame - Class in taskmanager.ui
Graphical user interface for the Smart Task Manager system.
SmartTaskManagerFrame(TaskManager) - Constructor for class taskmanager.ui.SmartTaskManagerFrame
Constructs the Smart Task Manager UI and initializes all components.
suggestSchedule(List<Task>, WeatherForecast) - Method in interface taskmanager.api.SchedulePlanner
Generates scheduling recommendations based on a list of tasks and a weather forecast.
suggestSchedule(List<Task>, WeatherForecast) - Method in class taskmanager.impl.SchedulePlannerImpl
Suggests a schedule using a provided weather forecast.
suggestScheduleForLocation(List<Task>, String) - Method in interface taskmanager.api.SchedulePlanner
Generates scheduling recommendations based on tasks and a specific location.
suggestScheduleForLocation(List<Task>, String) - Method in class taskmanager.impl.SchedulePlannerImpl
Suggests a schedule for tasks based on real-time weather data for a given location.

T

task() - Method in record class taskmanager.model.ScheduleRecommendation
Returns the value of the task record component.
Task - Class in taskmanager.model
Represents a task in the system that can be scheduled and managed.
Task(String, String, LocalDateTime, boolean) - Constructor for class taskmanager.model.Task
Constructs a new Task.
taskmanager - package taskmanager
 
TaskManager - Interface in taskmanager.api
Main facade for the Smart Task Manager.
taskmanager.api - package taskmanager.api
 
taskmanager.exception - package taskmanager.exception
 
taskmanager.external - package taskmanager.external
 
taskmanager.impl - package taskmanager.impl
 
taskmanager.model - package taskmanager.model
 
TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder - Interface in taskmanager.api
Builder interface for constructing a TaskManager instance step-by-step.

TaskNotFoundException - Exception Class in taskmanager.exception
Exception thrown when a requested task cannot be found in the system.
TaskNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception class taskmanager.exception.TaskNotFoundException
Constructs a TaskNotFoundException for the given task ID.

Sets a custom TaskService implementation.
TaskService - Interface in taskmanager.api
Service interface for managing tasks.
toString() - Method in record class taskmanager.model.ScheduleRecommendation
Returns a string representation of this record class.

W

WeatherApiClient - Class in taskmanager.external
Client responsible for retrieving weather data from an external API (OpenWeatherMap).
WeatherApiClient(String) - Constructor for class taskmanager.external.WeatherApiClient
Constructs a WeatherApiClient with the given API key.
WeatherAPIException - Exception Class in taskmanager.exception
Exception thrown when an error occurs while communicating with the weather API.
WeatherAPIException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class taskmanager.exception.WeatherAPIException
Constructs a new WeatherAPIException with a message and root cause.
WeatherForecast - Class in taskmanager.model
Represents weather data for a specific location and time.
WeatherForecast(String, LocalDateTime, double, String, double) - Constructor for class taskmanager.model.WeatherForecast
Constructs a WeatherForecast object.
withStoragePath(String) - Method in interface taskmanager.api.TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
Sets the storage path for task persistence (optional).
withStoragePath(String) - Method in class taskmanager.impl.DefaultTaskManagerBuilder
Sets the storage path for saving tasks.
withWeatherApiKey(String) - Method in interface taskmanager.api.TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
Sets the API key used for weather service integration.
withWeatherApiKey(String) - Method in class taskmanager.impl.DefaultTaskManagerBuilder
Sets the API key used for accessing the weather service.
